about_preview.label: About us
about_preview.heading: 90 Years of Transformer Excellence
about_preview.description: VIETNAM DIAMOND & ZEBRA ELECTRIC is a subsidiary of Diamond Electric Holdings Co., Ltd. (Japan), specializing in high-quality transformer production for the global market.
about_preview.f1_desc: Every product is designed and optimized to meet each customer's unique specifications.
about_preview.f2_desc: Applying decades of Japanese manufacturing expertise with Vietnamese operational excellence.
about_preview.f3_desc: Home appliances, AV equipment, office automation, and xEV (electric vehicle) industries.

automotiveSection.description: ZVE supplies precision-engineered transformers and electronic components for the automotive sector — supporting xEV, hybrid, and next-generation vehicle platforms with Japan-grade quality standards.

certificationsSection.title: Our Certifications
certificationsSection.description: Manufactured in compliance with Japanese quality standards, ensuring high reliability and precision performance.

contactPreview.description: Whether you need custom automotive parts, want to discuss a partnership, or have questions about our capabilities, our team is ready to help. Reach out and experience the Zve difference.

hero.description: VIETNAM DIAMOND & ZEBRA ELECTRIC is a subsidiary of Diamond Electric Holdings Co., Ltd. (Japan), specializing in high-quality transformer production for the global market.

overview.label: Company Overview
overview.title: A World-Class Transformer Manufacturer in Vietnam
overview.desc_1: ZVE Vietnam operates a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility at Hoan Son Industrial Park, Bac Ninh. With over 500 engineers and technicians, we design and produce power, distribution, instrument, and custom transformers for utilities, industrial clients, and OEM partners across Asia and beyond.
overview.desc_2: As a wholly-owned subsidiary of Diamond Electric Holdings Co., Ltd. (Japan), we combine Japanese engineering discipline with Vietnamese manufacturing agility — delivering premium quality at competitive lead times.

items.title: Diamond Electric Founded
items.desc: Diamond Electric Co., Ltd. established in Japan, beginning a legacy of precision electrical engineering.

items.title: Global Expansion
items.desc: Diamond Electric Holdings expanded into Southeast Asian markets, bringing Japanese quality to the region.

items.title: Vietnam Factory Established
items.desc: ZVE Vietnam factory launched at Hoan Son Industrial Park, Bac Ninh — serving local and export markets.

items.title: ISO 9001 Certified
items.desc: Achieved international quality management certification, reinforcing commitment to world-class standards.

items.title: R&D Center Opened
items.desc: Dedicated research and development center inaugurated to accelerate innovation in transformer technology.

items.title: 1,000+ Projects Delivered
items.desc: Milestone of over 1,000 transformer projects delivered across Vietnam, Japan, and global partners.

items.title: Japanese Quality Spirit
items.desc: Rooted in Kaizen philosophy — continuous improvement, zero defects, and absolute accountability in every product we deliver.

items.title: Customer Commitment
items.desc: We treat every client requirement as a precise engineering challenge — delivering on time, on spec, and beyond expectation.

items.title: Innovation & R&D
items.desc: Investing continuously in new technologies and smart manufacturing to push the boundaries of transformer design.

items.title: Team & Partnership
items.desc: A culture of collaboration — our engineers, partners, and clients work as one team toward shared success.

items.title: Environmental Responsibility
items.desc: Designing energy-efficient transformers that reduce losses and contribute to a sustainable, low-carbon future.

items.title: Precision Engineering
items.desc: Every winding, every core, every test — performed to exacting tolerances that define the ZVE standard.

hanoi.label: About · Hanoi Office
hanoi.desc: Our Hanoi office bridges the gap between our Bac Ninh factory and clients across Vietnam — offering technical consultation, project support, and fast on-site response.
hanoi.feature_1_desc: Direct point of contact for quotations, specifications, and project coordination.
hanoi.feature_2_desc: Dedicated engineering team for installation guidance and warranty services.

group.label: Corporate Group
group.title: Part of Diamond Electric Holdings
group.desc: ZVE Vietnam is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Diamond Electric Holdings Co., Ltd. (DEHD), a Tokyo-based global leader in electrical components with 80+ years of heritage and operations in 15+ countries.

cta.title: Ready to work with ZVE?
cta.desc: Send us your technical requirements and get a response within 24 hours.

hero.title:
Build the future
with us
hero.desc: We are looking for passionate individuals who are not afraid of challenges and want to create products with real impact.

stable.title: Stable Working Environment
stable.desc: We provide a stable and well-structured working environment with clear processes and long-term orientation.

career.title: Long-term Career Development
career.desc: Employees are supported to develop their skills and build a sustainable career path within the company.

training.title: Training and Guidance
training.desc: Regular training sessions and guidance from experienced team members are provided.

respect.title: Respectful Workplace
respect.desc: We value mutual respect, responsibility, and professionalism in daily work.

performance.title: Performance-based Evaluation
performance.desc: Salary and bonuses are reviewed based on individual performance and contribution.

activities.title: Company Activities
activities.desc: Annual events and internal activities are organized to strengthen team cohesion.

international.title: International Collaboration
international.desc: Opportunities to work with Japanese clients and follow international standards.

process.title: Process-oriented Work
process.desc: Work is carried out following defined procedures to ensure quality and efficiency.

application.title: Application Submission
application.desc: Fill out the online form or send your CV via email. Response within 3 working days.

hr.title: HR Interview
hr.desc: A 30-minute call to understand you, your expectations, and company culture fit.

test.title: Technical Test
test.desc: Online test or take-home assignment suitable for the position.

interview.title: Technical Interview
interview.desc: Meet with the tech lead and team. In-depth discussion about your experience and solutions.

offer.title: Offer & Onboarding
offer.desc: Receive offer letter within 1 week. Welcome to the team!

hero.desc: Latest product updates, certifications, and corporate news from ZVE.

sidebar.japan_desc: Read the latest news and updates from our headquarters in Japan.

products_preview.label: Our Products
products_preview.title: Transformer Solutions
products_preview.desc: From engine components to safety systems, we deliver quality parts that meet the highest industry standards.

hft.title: High Frequency Transformer
hft.desc: Core component for switching power supplies and DC-DC converters. Custom winding and core selection.

hftc.title: High Frequency Transformer Choke
hftc.desc: Noise suppression and energy storage for EMI filtering and power conditioning applications.

hsrf.title: High Self Resonance Frequency
hsrf.desc: Optimized for communication equipment and high-frequency signal processing circuits.

ct.title: Current Transformer
ct.desc: High-accuracy current sensing for measurement, protection, and power monitoring systems.

overview.label: OVERVIEW
overview.desc: Diamond & Zebra Electric's Hanoi office, located at 19 Duy Tan, serves as a collaborative workspace for engineering coordination, project management, and client support in Vietnam.

equipment.label: OFFICE FACILITIES
equipment.title: World-Class Workspace
equipment.desc: Our office is equipped with high-performance engineering workstations, an electronic signal testing lab, and a dedicated R&D zone for next-generation automotive component prototyping.

cta.title: Ready to collaborate?
cta.desc: Connect with our engineering team for technical inquiries, partnership opportunities, or product information.

tabs.by_president: by YuuRi Ono, President and CEO

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content:
We Are Diverse Shiny Diamonds.
We Are Seeking the Happiness of Our Comrades*,
By Supporting Our Customers First,
By Contributing to Society,
With the Commitment to Earn Their Trust.
mission.footnote: * I intentionally call employees Comrades as they are far more than colleagues or teammates: we have overcome fierce struggles against all odds in the past and now fight for a bright future, powered by our Scrum of Fire, a symbol of burning passion binding us as one.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: Contribute to the Improvement of Global Environment by Connecting Cars and Homes with Manufacturing

policies.title: President's Three Major Policies
policies.content:
1. Meet Customer Quality Standards.
2. Reduce Costs.
3. Promote Positive Work Environment.

quality.title: Quality Policy
quality.content:
We Keep on Providing Peace of Mind,
Safety and Excitement to the World 
 by Striving to Meet the High Standards of 
 Our World-Class Customers in Manufacturing.

manufacturing.title: President’s Manufacturing Policy
manufacturing.content:
GENBA, GENBA, GENBA
Do Stand in Their Shoes.
 Really Do.

humanrights.title: Declaration of Multifaceted Human Rights
humanrights.content:
We, All Diamonds, respect all kinds of blood, color, body, origin, tribe, gender, age, belief or religion.

We never accept any kind of discrimination, never allow people discriminate against the weak.

We maintain fair and green trades, never include any kind of discrimination, to serve the public interest.
